name: Thad Trent
background: Thad Trent has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since February 2021. Prior to joining the Company, Mr. Trent served as Chief Financial Officer of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation from 2014 until its sale to Infineon Technologies AG in April 2020.
